one_time_description: Additional COVID-19 funding from ISC of $1,319,344 plus $135,782 from FNESC for education
economic_notes: Two government business enterprises: Penelakut Seafood Ltd. and Spune'lexutth' Holdings Incorporated. Spune'luxutth' Holdings Inc. advance converted to contributed surplus under economic development incentive during the year.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Two GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Penelakut Seafood Ltd. and Spune'lexutth' Holdings Inc. No fully consolidated subsidiaries. COVID-19 additional ISC funding of $1,319,344 and FNESC additional education funding of $135,782 received. Spune'luxutth' Holdings Inc. advance was converted to contributed surplus during the year. Wages and benefits from expenses by object: wages $4,184,600 + benefits $577,993 = $4,762,593 total salaries. OSR calculated as total revenue $17,311,688 minus ISC $10,482,610, Health Authority $1,729,121, CSETS $367,278, Province of BC $1,152,046, FNESC $1,361,879 = $2,219,634. No schedule of remuneration disclosed. Replacement and Operating Reserves of $510,226 included in liabilities.
